## Chill Craft

This is the ideal modpack for your Minecraft phase. No difficult mods, only a vanilla with some extras

Features:
- Shaders
- Distant Horizons
- Map on the screen
- Backpacks
- Waystones for teleport
- Optimized graphic with sodium mod
